title: Open VSX darwin-arm64 publish with cross-built Intel LSP

source.subject: ci(open-vsx): publish darwin-arm64 VSIX and cross-build Intel LSP

body:
## Outcome

Publish darwin-arm64 VSIX and cross-build Intel LSP.

## Context

- Workstream **editor-extension** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **VS Code extension & Open VSX** (`v02-editor-extension`).
- LSP work shares the typed HIR spine with analyze/build; workspace templates feed the project graph pipeline.
- Open VSX matrix includes **darwin-arm64** and **darwin-x64** with cross-built Intel LSP where needed.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`e174369`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/e174369) — ci(open-vsx): publish darwin-arm64 VSIX and cross-build Intel LSP
